title: AI Research Assistant
description: Supabase is expanding its AI research and is seeking an AI Research Assistant to help build the next generation of developer tools. You'll work fully remote, collaborating with our research team on machine learning, LLM applications, and data infrastructure. Help shape the future of open-source databases and AI integration.
responsibilities: Conduct research on AI/ML architectures and techniques for database optimization
Develop prototypes and proof-of-concepts for new AI-powered features
Analyze large-scale data to identify patterns and optimization opportunities
Collaborate with engineering teams to implement research findings
Contribute to research papers and documentation
Stay current with latest AI/ML advancements and evaluate their relevance to Supabase

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Statistics, or related field; Master's preferred
skills: Strong programming skills in Python and SQL
Experience with machine learning frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow, JAX)
Understanding of neural networks and deep learning
Experience with large language models and transformers
Knowledge of database systems and optimization

benefits: Fully remote work with flexible schedule
Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
Professional development budget for courses and conferences
